name: Oncosil Medical Ltd
analysis: OSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 62% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.6500. Trade idea: entry A$0.7950, stop A$0.4306, target A$0.9300 (0.37:1) — then trail it.
